name: Sara Lee's Macaroons
recipeInstructions:
1. Knead almond paste with hands until soft and break into small pieces.
2. In a bowl of mixer, beat egg whites with salt.
3. Add granulated sugar to the egg white mixture and beat until all is incorporated.
4. Gradually add almond paste to the mixture, beating until smooth and thick.
5. Beat in powdered sugar as needed to achieve a batter that holds its shape.
6. Cover baking sheets with two layers of heavy brown paper.
7. Drop mounds of batter onto the paper about 2 inches apart.
8. Bake at 300°F (150°C) for 20-25 minutes, or until lightly browned.
9. Remove from oven and slide the paper off onto a damp dish towel folded to fit the baking sheet size.
10. Allow macaroons to cool or use a small metal spatula to remove them from the paper once cooled.
11. Cool on wire racks before storing in a tightly covered container.
